name: CoreKeeper
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install CoreKeeper and run it.

**GameID:** Your GameID will be displayed in the log after the server successfully started.

**Port Forwarding:** You don't have to forward any ports for this game because it uses the Steam Network and the GameID establish the connection.

ATTENTION: First Startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files!

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description:
The GAME_ID that the container downloads at startup.
If you want to install a static or beta version of the game change the value to: '896660 -beta YOURBRANCH' (without quotes, replace YOURBRANCH with the branch or version you want to install).

variables.name: World Name
variables.description: Enter your prefered world name here.

variables.name: World Index Number
variables.description: Only change when you know what you are doing!

variables.name: GAME_PARAMS
variables.description: Enter your extra start up commands for the server here otherwise leave empty.

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.

variables.name: UID
variables.description: Only change if you know what you are doing!

variables.name: GID
variables.description: Only change if you know what you are doing!
